channel.title: Python on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in Python on ExitCode0

item.title: How to Secure a Python Project Against Supply Chain Attacks: Dependabot, pip-audit, and Branch Protection
item.description: Supply chain attacks like Mini Shai-Hulud hit PyPI in 2026. Here's how to harden a Python project with pinned deps, pip-audit in CI, Dependabot, and branch protection.

item.title: Python Development in Docker Containers
item.description: Develop Python scripts inside Docker containers for reproducible, isolated environments. Compare containerised workflows versus virtual environments for consistent team tooling.

item.title: Collect bitcoin price data with python and Coinbase
item.description: Collect live Bitcoin and crypto price data from the Coinbase API using Python 3. Store time-series readings in InfluxDB and visualise price trends in Grafana dashboards.

item.title: Writing to an InfluxDB server with Python3
item.description: Write time-series data to InfluxDB from Python 3 for Grafana visualisation. Store sensor readings with nanosecond timestamps using the influxdb-client library.

item.title: Debian 10 - How to upgrade python 3.7 to python 3.9
item.description: Upgrade Python 3.7 to 3.9 on Debian 10 by compiling from source and using update-alternatives. Resolve pip and lsb_release compatibility issues after major version change.

item.title: Calculating compound interest with Python 3
item.description: Calculate compound interest in Python 3 with a reusable function. Covers principal, rate, and period inputs with formatted currency output and annual breakdown.

item.title: How To call a bash command with variables in Python
item.description: Call bash commands with variable arguments from Python 3 using subprocess. Pass dynamic values to shell commands and capture stdout output for scripting and automation.

item.title: Monitor your public IP address with Python
item.description: Monitor public IP address changes in Python using OpenDNS API lookups. Detect VPN connection drops and verify IP masking with a continuous polling loop and alerting.

item.title: How To: Python infinite loops with while true
item.description: Build Python infinite loops with while True for continuous polling or monitoring scripts. Handle KeyboardInterrupt exceptions for graceful exit and include sleep intervals.

item.title: Python 2.7 end-of-life - The time to upgrade is upon us
item.description: Python 2.7 reaches end of life on 1 January 2020 — no further security patches after that date. How to plan the migration to Python 3 for production scripts and dependencies.

item.title: Kasa home automation with IFTTT and python webhooks
item.description: Automate TP-Link Kasa smart plugs using IFTTT webhooks triggered from Python scripts. Control smart home devices conditionally from any application with HTTP requests.

item.title: Kali Linux - How to upgrade python 2.7 to python 3.7
item.description: Set Python 3.7 as default in Kali Linux replacing outdated Python 2.7. Configure interpreter priority with update-alternatives for modern scripting and security tools.

item.title: Ubuntu 19.10 - How to upgrade python 2.7 to python 3.7
item.description: Upgrade Python default version on Ubuntu 19.10 from 2.7 to 3.7. Configure interpreter priority and resolve pip compatibility issues on a modern Ubuntu release.

item.title: Getting started with Python 3 - a beginner's cheat sheet
item.description: Python 3 beginner cheat sheet covering variables, loops, functions, and string handling. Quick reference guide for foundational programming with practical, runnable examples.

item.title: Changing the default python version in Debian
item.description: Change default Python version in Debian from 2.7 to 3.x using update-alternatives. Set interpreter priority and switch between multiple installed Python versions.

item.title: Debian 9 - How to upgrade python 3.5 to python 3.7
item.description: Install Python 3.7 on Debian 9 by compiling from source, replacing 3.5 as default. Fix pip and system library issues with update-alternatives after a major upgrade.
